description: A managed live PilotSwarm worker preserves deployment incident context across two client turns.

input.prompt: For this PilotSwarm E2E eval, remember this deployment incident code phrase: riverglass-42. Acknowledge briefly.
What deployment incident code phrase did I ask you to remember? Reply exactly: CODE PHRASE: riverglass-42

checks.rubric: Pass only if the multi-turn session retained the deployment incident phrase from the first turn and answered the second turn with the requested phrase.
